plugins.name: vercel
plugins.description: Vercel deployment platform integration. Manage deployments, check build status, access logs, configure domains, and control your frontend infrastructure directly from Grok.

plugins.name: sentry
plugins.description: Sentry error monitoring integration. Access error reports, analyze stack traces, search issues by fingerprint, and debug production errors directly from your development environment.

plugins.name: chrome-devtools
plugins.description: Chrome DevTools integration. Control and inspect a live Chrome browser. Record performance traces, analyze network requests, check console messages with source-mapped stack traces, and automate browser actions.

plugins.name: cloudflare
plugins.description: Skills for the Cloudflare developer platform: Workers, Durable Objects, Agents SDK, MCP servers, Wrangler CLI, and web performance.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Core skills library for software development: test-driven development, systematic debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven engineering workflows and techniques.

plugins.name: mongodb
plugins.description: Official plugin for MongoDB (MCP Server + Skills). Connect to databases, explore data, manage collections, optimize queries, generate reliable code, implement best practices, develop advanced features, and more.

plugins.name: neon
plugins.description: Neon Serverless Postgres integration (MCP Server + Skills). Get started with Neon, manage projects and databases, pick connection methods, and create branches for migration testing and isolated development.

plugins.name: wix
plugins.description: Build, manage, and deploy Wix sites and apps (MCP Server + Skills). Includes CLI development skills and Wix MCP server for site management, eCommerce, CMS, dashboard extensions, and more.
